Class OldHinduLunarCalendar

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.AlternateCalendar
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.SevenDaysWeek
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.MonthDayYear
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.OldHinduSolarCalendar
org.jscience.social.history.calendars.OldHinduLunarCalendar
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ModifiedHinduLunarBRCalendar, ModifiedHinduLunarCalendar
public class OldHinduLunarCalendar extends OldHinduSolarCalendar
Implementation of the Old Hindu Lunar calendar (Surya Siddhanta). * @version 2.1
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    True if the current month is a leap month (adhika mÄsa).

    The length of a tithi (lunar day) in days.
    protected static final Rational
    LUNARMONTH
    The length of a synodic month (new moon to new moon) in days.
    protected static final String[]
    MONTHS
    List of Hindu lunar month names.
